creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Thanks for the report!  I verified lcms 2.5 source code, and
it indeed appears to be unaffected by this vulnerability (or
at least contains all the fixes that were applied to the previous
versions).  It appears that my reading of the report was incorrect.

I fixed the entry in the VuXML database.

--
ST4096-RIPE
